name: ASRock B850M Rock WiFi Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8200+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11axe 2x2 Wi-Fi 6E - BT 5.3 (B850MROCK WIFI)
shortName: ASRock B850M Rock WiFi Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Mid-range AM5 Micro-ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0 and Wi-Fi 6E connectivity.
